title: $\bf{S^1}$-index theory for the Lorentz force equation
comment: 25 pages; to appear in Ann. Sc. Norm. Super. Pisa Cl. Sci
summary: In this paper we prove that the $S^1$-invariance of the Poincaré action functional associated to the Lorentz force equation gives the existence of multiple critical points which are periodic solutions with a fixed period. To do this, we prove an abstract multiplicity result which is based upon the Lusternik-Schnirelman method with the $S^1$-index. The corresponding result in the context of the Fadell-Rabinowitz index is proved in Ekeland and Lasry (Ann. Math., 112 (1980)). The main feature of our abstract result is that it allows us to consider nonsmooth functionals satisfying only a weak compactness condition well adapted to the Poincaré functional.

AI.tldr: 证明了洛伦兹力方程Poincaré作用泛函的S^1不变性导致具有固定周期的多重周期解存在性
AI.motivation: 研究洛伦兹力方程的周期解存在性问题，特别是利用Poincaré作用泛函的对称性来获得多重解
AI.techniques: Lusternik-Schnirelman方法结合S^1指标理论，处理非光滑泛函的弱紧性条件
AI.main_theorems: 建立了基于S^1指标的抽象多重性定理，并将其应用于Poincaré作用泛函，证明了洛伦兹力方程存在多重周期解
AI.significance: 扩展了Ekeland和Lasry关于Fadell-Rabinowitz指标的工作，为处理非光滑泛函提供了新框架，在经典力学和变分法中具有重要意义

title: Painlevé Universality classes for the maximal amplitude solution of the Focusing Nonlinear Schrödinger Equation with randomness
summary: We establish universality for extremal solutions of the focusing nonlinear Schrödinger equation. Extremal solutions are $N$-soliton solutions that achieve the theoretical maximal amplitude and diverge as $N \to \infty$. We consider extremal solutions with the discrete eigenvalues randomly drawn from sub-exponential distributions, and identify two distinct universality classes, determined by the macroscopic structure of the spectrum: the Painlevé--III rogue-wave solution, where the eigenvalues take the form $λ_j = v_j + i μ_j$, and the Painlevé--V rogue wave solution, where $λ_j = -ζ\, j + v_j + i μ_j$, with $0 < ζ< 1$. (In both cases, $μ_{j}$ and $v_{j}$ are subexponential random variables.) Universality can then be summarized as follows: independently of the specific distribution of the eigenvalues, the rescaled solutions converge locally to a deterministic profile governed by the Painlevé-III equation in the first regime, and the Painlevé-V equation in the second. These results demonstrate that the formation of Painlevé-type rogue waves is a universal phenomenon robust to randomness.

AI.tldr: 建立了聚焦非线性薛定谔方程极值解的普适性理论，揭示了Painlevé型怪波形成的普遍现象
AI.motivation: 研究聚焦非线性薛定谔方程的极值解（N-孤子解），这些解达到理论最大振幅且在N→∞时发散，探索在随机谱结构下解的普适性行为
AI.techniques: 使用随机矩阵理论方法，考虑从亚指数分布中随机抽取离散特征值，分析谱的宏观结构，应用Painlevé方程理论
AI.main_theorems: 识别出两个不同的普适性类别：Painlevé-III怪波解（特征值形式λ_j = v_j + iμ_j）和Painlevé-V怪波解（λ_j = -ζj + v_j + iμ_j），证明重标度解局部收敛到由相应Painlevé方程决定的确定性轮廓
AI.significance: 证明了Painlevé型怪波形成是普遍现象，对随机性具有鲁棒性，为非线性波理论中的极端事件研究提供了理论基础

title: Existence and symmetry of extremals for the high order Hardy-Sobolev-Maz'ya inequalities
summary:
In this article, we establish the existence of an extremal function for the k-th order critical Hardy-Sobolev-Maz'ya (HSM) inequalities on the upper half space $\mathbb{R}^{n+1}_{+}$ when $k\ge 2$ and $n\geq 2k+2$:
  $$\int_{\mathbb{R}^{n}_{+}}|\nabla^{k}u|^2dx-\prod_{i=1}^{k}\frac{\left(2i-1\right)^2}{4}\int_{\mathbb{R}^{n}_{+}}\frac{u^2}{x_1^{2k}}dx\geq C_{n,k,\frac{2n}{n-2k}} \left(\int_{\mathbb{R}^{n}_{+}}|u|^{\frac{2n}{n-2k}}dx\right)^{\frac{n-2k}{n}}. $$
  The analysis of this extremal problem is challenging due to the presence of the higher order derivatives, the lack of translation invariance, the inapplicability of rearrangement techniques on the upper half-space, and the presence of a Hardy singularity along the boundary. To overcome these difficulties, instead of directly considering the HSM inequality on the upper half space, we establish the existence of an extremal for its equivalent version: Poincaré-Sobolev inequality on the hyperbolic space. We develop a novel duality theory of the minimizing sequences, the concentration-compactness principle for radial functions in the hyperbolic setting, which combines with the Helgason-Fourier analysis and the Riesz rearrangement inequality on the hyperbolic space, to resolve the lack of compactness issue. As an application, we also obtain the existence of positive symmetric solutions for the high order Brezis-Nirenberg equation on the entire hyperbolic space associated with the GJMS operators $P_k$ (i.e., when $k\ge 2$): $$ P_{k}\left(f\right)-αf=|f|^{p-2}f $$ at the critical situation $α=\prod\limits_{i=1}^{k}\frac{\left(2i-1\right)^2}{4}$ when either $2k+2\leq n$ and $p=\frac{2n}{n-2k}$ or $2k<n$ and $2<p<\frac{2n}{n-2k}$.

AI.tldr: 建立了上半空间高阶临界Hardy-Sobolev-Maz'ya不等式极值函数的存在性，并应用于双曲空间高阶Brezis-Nirenberg方程正对称解的存在性
AI.motivation: 研究上半空间高阶临界Hardy-Sobolev-Maz'ya不等式的极值问题，该问题具有高阶导数、缺乏平移不变性、无法使用重排技术以及边界Hardy奇异性等困难
AI.techniques: 通过等价的双曲空间Poincaré-Sobolev不等式建立极值存在性，发展了极小化序列的对偶理论、双曲径向函数的集中紧性原理，结合Helgason-Fourier分析和双曲空间Riesz重排不等式
AI.main_theorems: 当k≥2且n≥2k+2时，上半空间k阶临界Hardy-Sobolev-Maz'ya不等式极值函数存在；双曲空间高阶Brezis-Nirenberg方程在临界参数α=∏(2i-1)²/4时存在正对称解
AI.significance: 解决了高阶临界Hardy-Sobolev不等式极值存在性问题，发展了双曲空间集中紧性方法，为双曲空间高阶椭圆方程研究提供了新工具

title: Strong solutions to the initial-boundary-value problem of compressible MHD equations with degenerate viscosities and far field vacuum in 3D exterior domains
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2602.04597
summary: This paper concerns the initial-boundary-value problem (IBVP) of the compressible Magnetohydrodynamic (MHD) equations in 3D exterior domains with Navier-slip boundary conditions for the velocity and perfect conducting conditions for the magnetic field. For the case that the density approaches far-field vacuum initially and the viscosities are power functions of the density (ρ}δ with 0 < δ < 1), the local existence and uniqueness of strong solutions to the IBVP is established for regular large initial data. In particular, in contrast to the local theory of compressible Navier-Stokes equation Li-Lü-Yuan [24], we show that the magnetic field maintains the initial quality of decaying faster rate than density throughout the time evolution, which reveals the role of the magnetic field in handling singularities arising from density-dependent viscosities.

AI.tldr: 建立了三维外部区域可压缩MHD方程在密度依赖粘性系数下具有大初值的局部强解存在唯一性
AI.motivation: 研究三维外部区域可压缩磁流体动力学方程的初边值问题，考虑密度依赖的粘性系数（ρ^δ, 0<δ<1）和初始密度趋近真空的情况，旨在理解磁场在密度依赖粘性系数导致的奇异性处理中的作用
AI.techniques: 采用能量估计方法，建立局部存在唯一性理论，分析磁场衰减速率保持优于密度衰减的特性，处理Navier-slip边界条件和完美导电边界条件
AI.main_theorems: 建立了三维外部区域可压缩MHD方程在密度依赖粘性系数下具有大初值的局部强解存在唯一性定理，证明了磁场在整个时间演化中保持比密度更快的衰减速率
AI.significance: 揭示了磁场在处理密度依赖粘性系数导致的奇异性中的关键作用，为可压缩MHD方程的数学理论发展提供了新视角，特别是对于真空边界和外部区域问题

title: Infinitely many new solutions for a nonlinear coupled Schrödinger system
summary: We revisit the following nonlinear Schrödinger system \begin{align*}\begin{cases} -ε^{2}Δu +P(x) u= μ_1 u^3 +βuv^2, &~\text{in}\;\mathbb {R}^3,\\ -ε^{2}Δv+Q(x) v= μ_2 v^3 +βu^2v, &~\text{in}\;\mathbb{ R}^3, \end{cases} \end{align*} where $ε$ is a positive parameter, $P(x),\,Q(x)$ are the potential functions, $μ_1>0$, $μ_2>0$ and $β\in\mathbb R$ is a coupling constant. Employing the finite dimensional reduction method, we prove that there are new kind of synchronized and segregated solutions, which concentrate both in a bounded domain and near infinity, and present a special structure. Moreover, by applying the local Pohozaev identities and some point-wise estimates of the errors, we prove that the new kind of synchronized solutions are non-degenerate, which is of great interest independently. One of the main difficulties of Schrödinger system come from the interspecies interaction between the components, which never appear in the study of single equation. Secondly, prior to the construction of new solutions, we shall verify the non-degeneracy of the solutions established in [Peng-Pi, Discrete Contin. Dyn. Syst., 2016] for the Schrödinger systems.

AI.tldr: 证明了非线性薛定谔系统存在新型同步和分离解，这些解在有限区域和无穷远处同时集中，并具有特殊结构
AI.motivation: 研究耦合非线性薛定谔系统，解决由于组分间相互作用带来的困难，这些困难在单方程研究中不会出现
AI.techniques: 有限维约化方法、局部Pohozaev恒等式、误差的点态估计、非退化性验证
AI.main_theorems: 1. 构造新型同步和分离解，在有限域和无穷远处同时集中；2. 证明新型同步解的非退化性；3. 验证已有解的非退化性
AI.significance: 为耦合薛定谔系统提供了新的解结构，非退化性结果具有独立的理论价值，深化了对系统解空间的理解

title: Precise propagation profile for some monostable free boundary problems in time-periodic media
summary: We consider reaction-diffusion equations of the form \begin{equation*} u_t - d u_{xx} = f(t,u), \quad t>0,\ \ x \in [g(t), h(t)], \end{equation*} where $f(t,u)$ is periodic in $t$ and monostable in $u$, and the interval $[g(t), h(t)]$ represents the one dimensional population range of a species with density $u(t,x)$ at time $t$ and spatial location $x$. The free boundaries $x=g(t)$ and $x=h(t)$ evolve subject to a ``preferred population density" condition at the habitat edges. Analogous to the traveling wave solutions in the corresponding Cauchy problem, semi-wave solutions play a fundamental role in understanding the propagation phenomena governed by the free boundary problem here. But in contrast to the Cauchy problem, where the KPP condition plays a subtle role in the precise approximation of its solution (with compactly supported initial function) by the traveling wave solution with minimal speed, here we prove the existence and uniqueness of a semi-wave in a general monostable setting, and obtain a precise description of the convergence of the solution toward the semi-wave as time goes to infinity, where the KPP condition plays no special role. Previously, such a sharp result was proved for a free boundary model only when $f$ is autonomous ($f=f(u)$, see \cite{D} or \cite{DL15} for a related free boundary model), or a less precise result was obtained in the time-periodic case under an extra strong KPP condition on $f$ (see \cite{MDW}, or \cite{DGP} for a related free boundary model). This work appears to be the first to prove the sharp convergence result for a general monostable free boundary problem in a heterogeneous environment, and we believe the methods developed here should have applications to related free boundary problems in heterogeneous media with nonlinearities more general than those of KPP type.

AI.tldr: 证明了具有自由边界的一般单稳态反应扩散方程在半波解存在唯一性及解的渐近收敛性方面的尖锐结果
AI.motivation: 研究具有自由边界的反应扩散方程在异质环境中的传播现象，其中非线性项是时间周期且单稳态的，自由边界由"偏好种群密度"条件控制
AI.techniques: 使用半波解作为基本工具，发展了处理一般单稳态自由边界问题的方法，不依赖于KPP条件
AI.main_theorems: 证明了半波解的存在唯一性，并获得了解向半波解的精确收敛性描述，在一般单稳态条件下成立
AI.significance: 首次在异质环境中对一般单稳态自由边界问题证明了尖锐收敛结果，方法可应用于更广泛的非线性自由边界问题

title: Dynamics of a nonlocal epidemic model with a new free boundary condition, part 1: Spreading-vanishing dichotomy
summary: This paper investigates the long-time dynamics of a nonlocal epidemic model with free boundaries, where a pathogen with density $u(t,x)$ and the infected humans with density $v(t,x)$ evolve according to a reaction-diffusion system with nonlocal diffusion over a one dimensional interval $[g(t), h(t)]$, which represents the epidemic region expanding through its boundaries $x=g(t)$ and $x=h(t)$, known as free boundaries. Such a model with free boundary conditions based on those of Cao et al. \cite{fb27} was considered by several works. Inspired by recent works of Feng et al. \cite{fb20} and Long et al. \cite{fb5}, we propose a new free boundary condition, where the expansion rate of the epidemic region, determined by $h'(t)$ and $g'(t)$, is proportional to a linear combination of the outward flux of the pathogen \(u\) through the range boundary (as in \cite{fb27}) and the weighted total population of infected individuals \(v\) within the region (as in \cite{fb5}). We prove that the system under this new free boundary condition is well-posed, and its long-time dynamical behavior is characterized by a spreading-vanishing dichotomy. Moreover, we obtain sharp criteria for this dichotomy, including a sharp threshold in terms of the initial data $(u_0,v_0)$; and by studying a related eigenvalue problem, we also find a sharp threshold in terms of the diffusion rate, which complements related results in Nguyen and Vo \cite{fb7}. This is Part $1$ of a two part series. In Part $2$, we will determine the spreading speed of the model when spreading occurs, and for some typical classes of kernel functions, we will obtain the precise rates of accelerated spreading.

AI.tldr: 提出具有新自由边界条件的非局部流行病模型，建立了适定性和传播-消亡二分法，并获得了尖锐的阈值判据
AI.motivation: 研究具有自由边界的非局部流行病模型的长时间动力学行为，结合病原体扩散通量和感染人群加权总人口提出新的自由边界条件
AI.techniques: 反应扩散系统、自由边界问题、非局部扩散、特征值问题、适定性分析、长时间渐近行为分析
AI.main_theorems: 1) 系统在新自由边界条件下的适定性；2) 传播-消亡二分法；3) 基于初始数据的尖锐阈值判据；4) 基于扩散率的尖锐阈值判据
AI.significance: 为流行病传播动力学提供了新的数学模型和分析框架，完善了相关理论结果，为理解传染病空间传播机制提供了数学基础

title: Lipschitz regularity of harmonic quasiconformal maps between Lyapunov domains in $\mathbb{R}^n$
summary: We prove that every sense-preserving harmonic $K$--quasiconformal homeomorphism $f\colon D\toΩ$ between Lyapunov domains (equivalently, bounded $C^{1,α}$ domains) in $\mathbb{R}^n$, $α\in(0,1]$, is globally Lipschitz on $\overline D$. The argument is based on a boundary iteration scheme: an initial Hölder modulus for the boundary trace (coming from quasiconformality) is improved via the $C^{1,α}$ graph representation of $\partialΩ$, yielding higher Hölder regularity for the normal component. This boundary gain is converted into a near-boundary gradient bound for harmonic functions through a basepoint boundary Hölder-to-gradient estimate obtained by flattening the boundary and using local harmonic-measure bounds. Quasiconformality then propagates the resulting control from one component to the full differential, and iteration gives boundedness of $|Df|$ up to the boundary. Along the way we briefly survey several standard tools from the theory of quasiconformal harmonic mappings (QCH), including boundary Hölder continuity, distortion of derivatives, and boundary-to-interior propagation principles that enter the iteration.

AI.tldr: 证明了在Lyapunov域之间的保向调和K-拟共形同胚具有全局Lipschitz连续性
AI.motivation: 研究调和拟共形映射在边界上的正则性问题，特别是从边界Hölder连续性到全局Lipschitz连续性的提升
AI.techniques: 边界迭代方案、边界Hölder模的提升、C^{1,α}图表示、调和测度边界估计、边界平坦化、拟共形性传播
AI.main_theorems: 证明了Lyapunov域（有界C^{1,α}域）之间的保向调和K-拟共形同胚在闭包上是全局Lipschitz的
AI.significance: 为调和拟共形映射理论提供了重要的边界正则性结果，建立了从边界Hölder连续性到全局Lipschitz连续性的完整框架

title: Convergence of the PML method for thermoelastic wave scattering problems
summary: This paper is concerned with the thermoelastic obstacle scattering problem in three dimensions. A uniaxial perfectly matched layer (PML) method is firstly introduced to truncate the unbounded scattering problem, leading to a truncated PML problem in a bounded domain. Under certain constraints on model parameters, the well-posedness for the truncated PML problem is then proved except possibly for a discrete set of frequencies, based on the analytic Fredholm theory. Moreover, the exponential convergence of the uniaxial PML method is established in terms of the thickness and absorbing parameters of PML layer. The proof is based on the PML extension technique and the exponential decay properties of the modified fundamental solution. As far as we know, this is the first convergence result of the PML method for the time-harmonic thermoelastic scattering problem.

AI.tldr: 首次建立了三维热弹性障碍散射问题中单轴完美匹配层方法的指数收敛性
AI.motivation: 研究三维热弹性障碍散射问题，该问题涉及弹性波和热效应的耦合，需要处理无界域上的散射问题。完美匹配层方法常用于截断无界域，但热弹性散射问题的PML收敛性尚未得到证明。
AI.techniques: 使用单轴完美匹配层方法截断无界域；基于解析Fredholm理论证明适定性；利用PML延拓技术和修正基本解的指数衰减性质证明收敛性
AI.main_theorems: 1) 在模型参数约束下，除可能的离散频率集外，证明了截断PML问题的适定性；2) 建立了单轴PML方法关于PML层厚度和吸收参数的指数收敛性
AI.significance: 这是首次证明热弹性散射问题PML方法的收敛性，为数值模拟提供了理论保证，对耦合场散射问题的计算具有重要意义

title: Regularity results for linear parabolic equations on Carnot tori via mollifier kernel construction
summary: This paper first proves the existence, uniqueness and regularity of the solution to a class of linear backward parabolic equations on Carnot tori, namely the periodic linear parabolic equation on Carnot groups. Such groups are non-commutative and typical examples of sub-Riemannian manifolds. Moreover, we apply the results for this equation to its dual equation (i.e., the Fokker-Planck-Kolmogorov equation in the general form), and derive the existence, uniqueness and regularity of its weak solution. To obtain the regularity results for solutions to the linear parabolic equation and its dual equation, firstly, we construct several families of mollifiers adapted respectively to the Hörmander vector fields generating Carnot groups, Carnot tori and dual spaces of non-isotropic Hölder spaces; secondly, we use the theory of singular integral operators to establish stronger a priori regularity for the solutions.

AI.tldr: 在Carnot环面上建立线性向后抛物方程及其对偶方程解的存在性、唯一性和正则性理论
AI.motivation: 研究Carnot群（非交换群和次黎曼流形的典型例子）上的周期线性抛物方程，这类方程在非交换几何和次黎曼几何中具有基础重要性，其解的正则性分析面临特殊挑战
AI.techniques: 1) 构造适应于Hörmander向量场、Carnot环面和非各向同性Hölder空间对偶空间的磨光子族；2) 应用奇异积分算子理论建立更强的先验正则性估计
AI.main_theorems: 1) Carnot环面上线性向后抛物方程解的存在性、唯一性和正则性；2) 对偶方程（一般形式的Fokker-Planck-Kolmogorov方程）弱解的存在性、唯一性和正则性
AI.significance: 为次黎曼几何中的抛物方程理论奠定基础，将经典抛物方程理论推广到非交换和非各向同性的几何框架，对概率论（Fokker-Planck方程）和几何分析有重要应用

title: Global smooth solutions in a one-dimensional thermoviscoelastic model with temperature-dependent paramaters
summary: This manuscript is concerned with the system \begin{align*} \left\{ \begin{array}{l} u_{tt} = (γ(Θ) u_{xt})_x + (a(x,t) u_x)_x +(f(Θ))_x, \\[1mm] Θ_t = DΘ_{xx} + γ(Θ) u_{xt}^2 + f(Θ) u_{xt}, \end{array} \right. \end{align*} which is used to describe thermoviscoelastic developments in one-dimensional Kelvin-Voigt materials. \abs It is assumed that $a,γ$ and $f$ are sufficiently smooth functions that satisfy $$c_γ<γ(ζ)<C_γ, \quad γ''(ζ) \le 0,\quad f(0)=0, \quad |f'(ζ)|\le C_f \quad \mbox{ and } |f(ζ)|\le C_f(1+ζ)^α\quad \mbox{ for all }ζ\ge 0 $$ and some positive constants $c_γ,C_γ,C_f>0$ and $α\in (0,5/6)$. Under these conditions, this study then establishes a result on the existence of global classical solutions for sufficiently smooth but arbitrarily large initial data.

AI.tldr: 建立了描述一维Kelvin-Voigt材料热粘弹性发展的非线性偏微分方程系统全局经典解的存在性结果
AI.motivation: 研究一维Kelvin-Voigt材料的热粘弹性发展过程，该系统由耦合的波动方程和热传导方程组成，描述材料在热效应和粘弹性效应下的动力学行为
AI.techniques: 利用能量估计、先验估计、Galerkin逼近方法，结合非线性函数的特定结构条件（如γ''≤0）和增长条件（|f(ζ)|≤C_f(1+ζ)^α）
AI.main_theorems: 在γ、f满足特定光滑性和结构条件下，对充分光滑但任意大的初始数据，建立了全局经典解的存在性定理
AI.significance: 为热粘弹性材料模型提供了严格的数学理论基础，扩展了非线性耦合PDE系统的全局适定性理论，对固体力学和材料科学有重要应用价值

title: Large time existence in a thermoviscoelastic evolution problem with mildly temperature-dependent parameters
summary: We consider \begin{align*} \label{HS} \left\{ \begin{array}{l} u_{tt} = (γ(Θ) u_{xt})_x + a (γ(Θ) u_x)_x +(f(Θ))_x, \\[1mm] Θ_t = DΘ_{xx} + Γ(Θ) u_{xt}^2 + F(Θ) u_{xt}, \end{array}\right. \qquad \qquad (\star) \end{align*} under Neumann boundary conditions for $u$ and Dirichlet boundary conditions for $Θ$ in a bounded interval $Ω\subset\mathbb{R}$. \abs This model is a generalization of the classical system for the description of strain and temperature evolution in a thermo-viscoelastic material following a Kelvin-Voigt material law, in which $γ\equiv Γ$ and $f\equiv F$. Different variations of this model have already been analyzed in the past and the present study draws upon a known result concerning the existence of classical solutions, which are local in time, for suitably smooth initial data, arbitrary $a>0$, $D>0$ and $γ,f\in C^2([0,\infty))$ as well as $Γ,F\in C^1([0,\infty))$ with $γ>0,Γ\ge0$ and $F(0)=0$. Our work focuses on proving that existence times for classical solutions can be arbitrarily large, assuming sublinear temperature dependencies of $γ$ and $f$, and further $|F(s)|\le C_F(1+s)^α$ for some $C_F>0$ and $α\in(0,1)$. In particular, for any given $T_\star$, initial mass $M$ and $0<\underlineγ<\overlineγ$, there exists a constant $δ_\star(M,T_\star,a,D, Ω, \underlineγ, \overlineγ,C_F,α)>0$, such that if $$\underlineγ\leγ\le \overlineγ\quad\mbox{ and }\quad 0\le Γ\le \overlineγ\quad \mbox{ as well as } \quad\|γ'\|_{L^\infty([0,\infty))}\le δ_\star \quad \mbox{ and }\quad \|f'\|_{L^\infty([0,\infty))}\le δ_\star $$ hold, the maximal existence time of the classical solution to $(\star)$ surpasses $T_\star$.

AI.tldr: 证明了热粘弹性材料模型中经典解的存在时间可以任意大，只要材料参数的温度依赖性足够小且满足次线性增长条件
AI.motivation: 研究热粘弹性材料中应变和温度演化的广义模型，该模型基于Kelvin-Voigt材料定律，旨在证明经典解的长时间存在性，超越已有文献中的局部存在结果
AI.techniques: 使用能量估计、先验估计、最大原理等PDE分析技术，通过控制材料参数的温度依赖性（γ'和f'的L∞范数）来获得全局存在性
AI.main_theorems: 存在常数δ*，当材料参数满足γ'和f'的L∞范数小于δ*时，经典解的最大存在时间可以超过任意给定的T*，即解可以长时间存在
AI.significance: 为热粘弹性材料模型的长时间行为提供了理论保证，揭示了材料参数的温度依赖性对解稳定性的关键影响，对材料科学中的热力学建模有重要意义

title: Fundamental solution for higher order homogeneous hypoelliptic operators structured on Hörmander vector fields
summary: We introduce and study a new class of higher order differential operators defined on $\mathbb{R}^{n}$, which are built with Hörmander vector fields, homogeneous w.r.t. a family of dilations (but not left invariant w.r.t. any structure of Lie group) and have a structure such that a suitably lifted version of the operator is hypoelliptic. We call these operators ''generalized Rockland operators''. We prove that these operators are themselves hypoelliptic and, under a natural condition on the homogeneity degree, possess a global fundamental solution $Γ\left( x,y\right) $ which is jointly homogeneous in $\left( x,y\right) $ and satisfies sharp pointwise estimates. Our theory can be applied also to some higher order heat-type operators and their fundamental solutions.

AI.tldr: 提出并研究一类基于Hörmander向量场的高阶微分算子，称为"广义Rockland算子"，证明其具有亚椭圆性并构造满足尖锐点估计的全局基本解。
AI.motivation: 研究一类新型高阶微分算子，这些算子由Hörmander向量场构成，相对于一族伸缩变换齐次（但关于任何李群结构不是左不变的），且具有适当的提升版本为亚椭圆的结构。这类算子推广了经典的Rockland算子理论。
AI.techniques: 使用Hörmander向量场理论、齐次空间分析、算子提升技术、亚椭圆性证明方法，以及基本解的构造和点估计技术。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 证明广义Rockland算子本身是亚椭圆的；2. 在齐次度的自然条件下，构造全局基本解Γ(x,y)，该基本解在(x,y)上联合齐次且满足尖锐的点估计；3. 理论可应用于某些高阶热型算子及其基本解。
AI.significance: 扩展了Rockland算子理论到更一般的几何框架，为研究非李群结构下的偏微分方程提供了新工具，对亚椭圆算子理论和基本解构造有重要贡献，可应用于热传导方程等物理问题。

title: Weak and strong averaging principle for 2D Boussinesq equations with non-Lipschitz Poisson jump noise
summary: In this paper, we study the averaging principle for 2D Boussinesq equations with non-Lipschitz Poisson jump noise. Precisely, we will first explore the well-posedness, regularity estimates and tightness of the vorticity variable. Then, we prove the ergodicity of the temperature variable. Next, we prove that the vorticity variable converge to the solution of the averaged equation in probability and $2p$th-mean, under different conditions, as time scale parameter $\varepsilon$ goes to zero. Finally, we present a specific case study and conduct numerical simulations to substantiate the main conclusions of this paper.

AI.tldr: 研究带非Lipschitz泊松跳跃噪声的2D Boussinesq方程的遍历性和平均化原理
AI.motivation: 研究随机扰动下流体力学方程的统计行为，特别是带非Lipschitz泊松跳跃噪声的2D Boussinesq方程，探索其长时间行为和平均化性质
AI.techniques: 随机偏微分方程理论、遍历性分析、紧性论证、概率收敛方法、数值模拟验证
AI.main_theorems: 1) 涡度变量的适定性、正则性估计和紧性；2) 温度变量的遍历性；3) 涡度变量在概率意义和2p阶矩意义下收敛到平均方程解；4) 具体案例研究和数值模拟验证
AI.significance: 扩展了随机流体力学方程的平均化理论，处理了非Lipschitz跳跃噪声这一技术难点，为大气海洋动力学中的随机建模提供理论支持

title: Flow reversal of the Stokes system with localized boundary data in the half space
summary: We consider the unsteady Stokes system in the half-space with zero initial data and nonzero, space-time localized boundary data. We show that there exist boundary influxes for which the induced flow exhibits flow reversal, in the sense that at least one component of the velocity field changes its sign in the half-space. This phenomenon is demonstrated by a careful analysis of the representation formula for the Stokes system in the half-space, including pointwise estimates, based on the Green tensor with nonzero boundary data. We construct solutions of the Stokes system such that the tangential components of the velocity field exhibit at least one sign change, while the normal component exhibits at least two sign changes. Moreover, the normal component of the constructed velocity field has the opposite sign to the tangential components near the boundary, whereas it has the same sign as the tangential components sufficiently far from the boundary.

AI.tldr: 证明了在半空间中非定常Stokes系统存在边界流入导致流动反转现象
AI.motivation: 研究半空间中非定常Stokes系统在零初始条件和局部时空边界数据下的流动行为，探索是否存在边界流入能诱导流动反转现象
AI.techniques: 基于非零边界数据的Green张量的表示公式分析，包括逐点估计，构造特定边界流入的Stokes系统解
AI.main_theorems: 存在边界流入使得诱导的流动出现反转：切向速度分量至少改变一次符号，法向分量至少改变两次符号；近边界处法向分量与切向分量符号相反，远离边界时符号相同
AI.significance: 揭示了非定常Stokes流动中边界条件诱导的复杂流动模式，对理解边界驱动流动的动力学行为有重要理论意义

title: Large bulk viscosity limit for compressible MHD equations in critical Besov spaces
summary: We study the large bulk viscosity limit for the compressible magnetohydrodynamics (MHD) equations in two and three dimensions. For arbitrarily large initial data in critical Besov spaces, we prove the global well-posedness of strong solutions and establish their convergence, with explicit quantitative rates, to solutions of the incompressible MHD system, as the bulk viscosity parameter tends to infinity. As an application of this singular-limit analysis, we construct global smooth solutions to the compressible MHD equations whose magnetic field undergoes reconnection, thereby extending to the compressible regime the reconnection scenarios previously identified for incompressible flows.

AI.tldr: 研究可压缩磁流体动力学方程在大体积粘度极限下的全局适定性和收敛性，并应用于磁重联现象
AI.motivation: 研究可压缩磁流体动力学方程在大体积粘度极限下的行为，建立与不可压缩MHD系统的联系，并探索可压缩流中的磁重联现象
AI.techniques: 临界Besov空间理论、大粘度极限分析、奇异极限方法、能量估计、收敛率定量分析
AI.main_theorems: 1. 在临界Besov空间中任意大初值下的全局适定性；2. 大体积粘度极限下解以显式定量速率收敛到不可压缩MHD解；3. 构造具有磁重联现象的可压缩MHD全局光滑解
AI.significance: 将不可压缩流中的磁重联现象推广到可压缩情形，为等离子体物理和天体物理中的磁重联研究提供严格数学基础

title: Explicit representation of solutions to a linear wave equation with time delay
summary:
This paper develops an explicit spectral representation for solutions of a one-dimensional linear wave equation with a constant time delay. The model is considered on a bounded interval with non-homogeneous Dirichlet boundary data and a prescribed history function. To accommodate the loss of global smoothness in time caused by delay terms, solutions are understood in a \textit{stepwise classical sense}, allowing jump discontinuities in the second time derivative at multiples of the delay while maintaining continuity of the solution and its first time derivative.
  By combining separation of variables with Sturm-Liouville expansions, the delayed PDE is reduced to a family of scalar second-order delay differential equations. Using delay-dependent fundamental solutions, we derive closed-form representation formulas for the modal dynamics and reconstruct the PDE solution as a Fourier series. Convergence conditions guaranteeing uniform convergence and admissibility of termwise differentiation in space are established. A numerical example demonstrates the practical computation of truncated series solutions and their visualization.

AI.tldr: 提出了具有常时滞的一维线性波动方程的显式谱表示方法
AI.motivation: 研究具有时间延迟的波动方程，这类方程在工程和物理中有广泛应用（如控制系统、材料科学），但延迟项会导致时间方向上的全局光滑性丧失，需要新的分析方法
AI.techniques: 分离变量法结合Sturm-Liouville展开，将延迟PDE化为标量二阶延迟微分方程族，使用延迟相关的基解，建立Fourier级数重构
AI.main_theorems: 推导了模态动力学的闭式表示公式，建立了保证一致收敛性和空间逐项微分可容许性的收敛条件，提出了"逐步经典意义"的解概念
AI.significance: 为延迟波动方程提供了系统的谱分析方法，解决了延迟项引起的光滑性问题，为数值计算和实际应用提供了理论基础

title: Large time stabilization of rough-data solutions in one-dimensional nonlinear thermoelasticity
summary:
In an open bounded real interval $Ω$, the model for one-dimensional thermoelasticity given by \[
  u_{tt} = u_{xx} - \big(f(Θ)\big)_x,
  \qquad
  Θ_t = Θ_{xx} - f(Θ) u_{xt}, \] is considered along with homogeneous boundary conditions of Dirichlet type for $u$ and of Neumann type for $Θ$, under the assumption that $f\in C^1([0,\infty))$ satisfies $f(0)=0$, $f'\in L^\infty((0,\infty))$ and $f'>0$ on $[0,\infty)$. The focus is on initial data which are merely required to be consistent with the fundamental principles of energy conservation and entropy nondecrease, by satisfying \[
  u_0\in W_0^{1,2}(Ω),
  u_{0t} \in L^2(Ω),
  0 \le Θ_0\in L^1(Ω), Θ_0 \not\equiv 0. \] Despite an apparent lack of favorable compactness properties that have underlain previous related studies on more regular settings, it is shown that corresponding weak solutions stabilize in the sense that \[
  \lim_{t\to\infty} \|u(\cdot,t)\|_{L^\infty(Ω)}=0 \] and \[
  {\rm ess} \lim_{\!\!\!\! t\to\infty} \|Θ(\cdot,t)-Θ_\infty\|_{L^\infty(Ω)}=0 \] with some $Θ_\infty>0$.

AI.tldr: 证明了在一维热弹性模型中，即使初始数据仅满足能量守恒和熵不减的基本原理，弱解仍会稳定到零位移和正常数温度状态。
AI.motivation: 研究一维热弹性模型的长时间行为，该模型包含位移方程和温度方程的非线性耦合。特别关注初始数据仅满足基本物理原理（能量守恒和熵不减）而非传统正则性假设的情况，这在先前研究中因缺乏紧性性质而难以处理。
AI.techniques: 使用弱解框架，克服了传统紧性方法的限制；利用能量守恒和熵不减原理作为基本约束；通过分析弱解的渐近行为来证明稳定性。
AI.main_theorems: 证明了即使初始数据仅满足基本物理原理，对应弱解仍会稳定：位移在L∞范数下趋于零，温度在L∞范数下趋于某个正常数Θ∞。
AI.significance: 扩展了热弹性系统稳定性理论，允许更一般的初始条件；为仅满足基本物理原理的弱解建立了渐近稳定性结果；为处理缺乏紧性的非线性耦合PDE系统提供了新思路。

title: A simple model for one-dimensional nonlinear thermoelasticity: Well-posedness in rough-data frameworks
summary:
In an open bounded interval $Ω$, the problem \[
  u_{tt} = u_{xx} - \big(f(Θ)\big)_x,
  Θ_t = Θ_{xx} - f(Θ) u_{xt}, \] is considered under the boundary conditions $u|_{\partialΩ}=Θ_x|_{\partialΩ}=0$, and for $f\in C^2([0,\infty))$ satisfying $f(0)=0$, $f'>0$ on $[0,\infty)$ and $f'\in W^{1,\infty}((0,\infty))$.
  In the sense of unconditional global existence, uniqueness and continuous dependence, this problem is shown to be well-posed within ranges of initial data merely satisfying \[
  u_0\in W_0^{1,2}(Ω),
  \quad
  u_{0t} \in L^2(Ω)
  \quad \mbox{and} \quad
  Θ_0 \in L^2(Ω)
  \mbox{ with $Θ\ge 0$ a.e.~in $Ω$,} \] and in classes of solutions fulfilling \[
  u\in C^0([0,\infty);W_0^{1,2}(Ω)),
  \qquad
  u_t \in C^0([0,\infty);L^2(Ω))
  \qquad \mbox{and} \qquad
  Θ\in C^0([0,\infty);L^2(Ω)) \cap L^2_{loc}([0,\infty);W^{1,2}(Ω)). \]

AI.tldr: 证明了具有非线性耦合的热弹性方程组在弱初始条件下的无条件全局适定性
AI.motivation: 研究一类非线性耦合的热弹性方程组，其中位移场u和温度场Θ通过非线性函数f(Θ)耦合，该模型描述热弹性材料中的热-力相互作用，需要建立弱解框架下的全局适定性理论
AI.techniques: 使用能量估计、先验估计、Galerkin逼近方法、紧性论证，以及处理非线性耦合项的特殊技巧，特别是处理f(Θ)u_xt项的技术
AI.main_theorems: 在初始条件仅需u₀∈W₀¹²(Ω), u₀ₜ∈L²(Ω), Θ₀∈L²(Ω)且Θ₀≥0的条件下，证明了问题存在唯一的全局弱解，且解连续依赖于初始数据，满足正则性条件u∈C⁰([0,∞);W₀¹²(Ω)), uₜ∈C⁰([0,∞);L²(Ω)), Θ∈C⁰([0,∞);L²(Ω))∩L²_loc([0,∞);W¹²(Ω))
AI.significance: 为非线性热弹性方程组建立了弱解理论框架，放宽了对初始正则性的要求，证明了无条件全局适定性，为后续研究此类耦合系统的长时间行为、稳定性分析等奠定了基础

title: Global solvability and stabilization in multi-dimensional small-strain nonlinear thermoviscoelasticity
summary:
Despite considerable developments in the literature of the past decades, a standing open problem in the analysis of continuum mechanics appears to consist of determining how far the prototypical model for small-strain thermoviscoelastic evolution in Kelvin-Voigt materials with inertia, as given by \[
  u_{tt} = μΔu_t + (λ+μ)\nabla\nabla\cdot u_t
  + \hatμ Δu + (\hatλ+\hatμ) \nabla\nabla\cdot u
  - B\nablaΘ,
  \qquad \qquad
  κΘ_t = DΔΘ+ μ|\nabla u_t|^2 + (λ+μ) |{\rm div} \, u_t|^2 - BΘ{\rm div} \, u_t,
  \qquad \qquad \qquad (\star) \] is globally solvable in multi-dimensional settings and for initial data of arbitrary size.
  The present manuscript addresses this in the context of an initial value problem in smoothly bounded $n$-dimensional domains with $n\ge 2$, posed under homogeneous boundary conditions of Dirichlet type for the displacement variable $u$, and of Neumann type for the temperature $Θ$. Within suitably generalized concepts of solvability, global existence of solutions is shown without any size restrictions on the data, and for a system actually more general than ($\star$) by, inter alia, allowing the heat capacity $κ$ to depend on $Θ$. Apart from that, results on large time behavior are derived which particularly assert stabilization of $Θ$ toward a spatially homogeneous limit.
  Besides on standard features related to energy conservation and entropy production, in its core parts the analysis relies on an evolution property of certain logarithmic refinements of classical entropy functionals, to the best of our knowledge undiscovered in precedent literature and possibly of independent interest.

AI.tldr: 证明了多维Kelvin-Voigt热粘弹性系统在任意大初始数据下的全局存在性和长时间行为
AI.motivation: 解决连续介质力学中长期存在的开放问题：多维Kelvin-Voigt热粘弹性系统在任意大初始数据下的全局可解性。该系统描述小应变热粘弹性演化，包含惯性项、粘弹性阻尼和热耦合效应。
AI.techniques: 基于能量守恒和熵产生原理，核心创新是发展了经典熵泛函的对数修正演化性质，该技术在前人文献中未被发现；使用广义可解性概念处理非线性耦合。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 在n≥2维光滑有界区域中，对任意大初始数据证明了系统(⋆)的全局解存在性；2. 允许热容κ依赖于温度Θ的更一般系统；3. 长时间行为结果：温度Θ稳定到空间均匀极限。
AI.significance: 解决了连续介质力学中长期存在的开放问题，发展了新的熵分析方法，对热粘弹性系统的数学理论有重要贡献，技术方法可能具有独立价值。

title: Stability of the $L^{p}$-Poincaré inequality for the Lebesgue and Gaussian probability measures with explicit geometric dependency
summary: In this paper, we obtain stability results for the $L^{p}$-Poincaré inequality for both Lebesgue and Gaussian probability measures (Theorem 3.3 and Theorem 3.6). Our approach relies on properties of the first eigenfunction of the (Gaussian) $p$-Laplacian operator and weighted Poincaré inequalities for log-concave measures on convex domains.

AI.tldr: 该论文证明了Lebesgue测度和Gaussian概率测度下$L^p$-Poincaré不等式在凸区域上的稳定性结果
AI.motivation: 研究$L^p$-Poincaré不等式在凸区域上的稳定性问题，特别是对于Lebesgue测度和Gaussian概率测度，这是泛函分析和几何测度论中的重要课题
AI.techniques: 利用(Gaussian)$p$-Laplacian算子的第一特征函数性质，以及对数凹测度在凸区域上的加权Poincaré不等式
AI.main_theorems: 定理3.3和定理3.6分别给出了Lebesgue测度和Gaussian概率测度下$L^p$-Poincaré不等式的稳定性结果
AI.significance: 这些结果为凸区域上Poincaré不等式的稳定性提供了新的理论保证，在偏微分方程、概率论和几何分析中有重要应用

title: Finite time singularities in the Landau equation with very hard potentials
summary: We consider the inhomogeneous Landau equation with $γ\in (\sqrt{3},2]$ and construct smooth, strictly positive initial data that develop a finite time singularity. The $C^α$-norm of the distribution function blows up for every $α>0$, whereas its $L^{\infty}$-norm remains uniformly bounded. In self-similar variables, the solution becomes asymptotically hydrodynamic - the distribution function converges to a local Maxwellian, while the hydrodynamic fields develop an asymptotically self-similar implosion whose profile coincides with a smooth imploding profile of the compressible Euler equations. To our knowledge, this provides the first example of a collisional kinetic model which is globally well-posed in the homogeneous setting, but admits finite time singularities for inhomogeneous data.

AI.tldr: 首次构造了非齐次Landau方程在特定参数范围内形成有限时间奇点的光滑正初值解
AI.motivation: 研究非齐次Landau方程的奇点形成问题，探索碰撞动力学模型在齐次情形下全局适定但在非齐次情形下可能出现奇点的现象
AI.techniques: 自相似变量变换、渐近流体动力学分析、局部Maxwellian逼近、压缩Euler方程光滑内爆剖面构造
AI.main_theorems: 对于γ∈(√3,2]的非齐次Landau方程，构造了光滑严格正初值使其在有限时间内形成奇点；分布函数的C^α范数对所有α>0爆破，而L^∞范数保持有界；在自相似变量下解渐近趋于流体动力学状态
AI.significance: 首次展示了碰撞动力学模型在齐次情形全局适定但非齐次情形可能出现奇点的现象，建立了Landau方程与压缩Euler方程内爆剖面之间的联系，为理解碰撞动力学奇点形成机制提供了新视角
